design_rationale: A 3-tier laterally modular wedge riser forming a semicircle. Features a solid back wall, chamfered edges, and lateral dovetail joints. Internally sloped to allow support-free printing in a right-side-up orientation.

capacity_and_layout.ducks_per_row_per_module: Row 1: ~2 ducks, Row 2: ~3 ducks, Row 3: ~4 ducks

structural_design.style: Shelled / Hollow underneath with self-supporting 45-degree internal slopes.

interlocking_joints.type: Lateral Dovetail (angled along the wedge radius)

structural_design.recommended_print_orientation: Printed right-side up. Internal geometry adjusted to 45-degree angles to eliminate supports.
